features.name: Integrated Stack
features.description: Search, JSON, TimeSeries, and Probabilistic structures (Bloom, Cuckoo) are now core native features.

features.name: Cluster-First Architecture
features.description: Slot-based cluster is now the default mode. Legacy standalone mode is deprecated and requires a flag to enable.

features.name: Threaded I/O 2.0
features.description: True multi-threaded execution for ALL commands, not just I/O. Improves performance by 2-3x on multi-core systems.

features.name: Field Expiry (HSETEX)
features.description: Support for per-field expiry in Hash structures.
